com.apple.security.cs.allow-jit.rationale: Electron's Chromium/V8 runtime requires JIT for normal renderer and preload execution under the hardened runtime.

com.apple.security.cs.allow-unsigned-exe.rationale: Electron and native Node modules can require unsigned executable memory during runtime initialization; removal must be validated against packaged smoke coverage.

com.apple.security.cs.disable-library-va.rationale: Packaged native modules such as better-sqlite3 and node-pty are loaded from app resources; this remains allowed until a signed helper or stricter native-module packaging path replaces it.
